queue.packName: Business Corporate Social Media Post Canva
queue.recommendedAction: Normalize into a six-slide business carousel set.
queue.why: Strong multi-slide business pack with obvious reusable SaaS and service-business applications.

queue.recommendedAction: Normalize the strongest square business layouts into evergreen educational and promotional templates.
queue.why: Six clean variations and multiple source formats make it a high-leverage business starter set.

queue.recommendedAction: Turn into offers, launch, and limited-time promotion templates.
queue.why: Direct conversion use case with clear value for small businesses and campaigns.

queue.recommendedAction: Normalize into market insight and educational explainer templates.
queue.why: Multi-tool source pack with strong educational potential beyond real estate.

queue.recommendedAction: Normalize into Market Clarity pillar templates for real-estate use.
queue.why: Highly aligned with the original Angie use case and an obvious early product fit.

queue.recommendedAction: Normalize selected Facebook, Instagram, and Pinterest variations after the core five packs.
queue.why: Useful cross-platform pack, but lower leverage than the stronger multi-layout template families.

queue.recommendedAction: Use as proof that Posterboy can support broader industries after the core business categories are stable.
queue.why: Good category-expansion example, but not a core first-pass template family.

queue.packName: High Quality Social Media Mockup A
queue.recommendedAction: Use for marketing presentation and polished preview rendering later.
queue.why: Mockup-only pack; useful for presentation, not customer-usable templates.

queue.recommendedAction: Treat as inspiration unless later demand proves it worth normalizing.
